title: 2026 Oscar predictions: Best Costume Design
text: The 98th Academy Awards ceremony will take place on March 15 on ABC, honoring films released during 2025. Five films received nominations for Best Costume Design, announced January 22. Frankenstein by Kate Hawley leads at 93.66% odds, followed by Sinners by Ruth E. Carter at 4.73%, Hamnet by Malgosia Turzanska at 1.08%, Avatar: Fire and Ash by Deborah L. Scott at 0.30%, and Marty Supreme by Miyako Bellizzi at 0.24%. Netflix's Guillermo del Toro adaptation stars Oscar Isaac, Jacob Elordi, and Mia Goth, following a brilliant but egotistical scientist who brings a creature to life with catastrophic consequences. Warner Bros. Sinners features Michael B. Jordan and Hailee Steinfeld as twin brothers attempting to escape their troubled past. Focus Features' Hamnet is directed by Chloé Zhao and stars Jessie Buckley and Paul Mescal. Historically, the Academy favors sweeping costume dramas and fantasy productions over contemporary settings for this award.
